```erlang
-spec solve(nums :: list(integer())) -> boolean().
solve(nums) ->
    N = length(nums),
    case find_p_q(nums, N) of
        {p, q} -> true;
        _ -> false
    end.

find_p_q(nums, N) ->
    lists:foldl(
        fun(P, Acc) ->
            case find_q(nums, P, N) of
                {Q, true} -> {P, Q};
                _ -> Acc
            end
        end,
        {nil, nil},
        lists:seq(1, N - 2)
    ).

find_q(nums, P, N) ->
    lists:foldl(
        fun(Q, Acc) ->
            case check_trionic(nums, P, Q, N) of
                true -> {Q, true};
                _ -> Acc
            end
        end,
        {nil, false},
        lists:seq(P + 1, N - 1)
    ).

check_trionic(nums, P, Q, N) ->
    Inc1 = check_increasing(nums, 0, P),
    Inc2 = check_decreasing(nums, P, Q),
    Inc3 = check_increasing(nums, Q, N - 1),
    Inc1 andalso Inc2 andalso Inc3.

check_increasing(nums, Start, End) ->
    lists:all(
        fun(I) -> nums(I) < nums(I + 1) end,
        lists:seq(Start, End - 1)
    ).

check_decreasing(nums, Start, End) ->
    lists:all(
        fun(I) -> nums(I) > nums(I + 1) end,
        lists:seq(Start, End - 1)
    ).
```

Please generate code to solve the following task:

给你一个长度为 `n` 的整数数组 `nums`。

如果存在索引 `0 < p < q < n − 1`，使得数组满足以下条件，则称其为 **三段式数组（trionic）**：

- `nums[0...p]` **严格** 递增，
- `nums[p...q]` **严格** 递减，
- `nums[q...n − 1]` **严格** 递增。

如果 `nums` 是三段式数组，返回 `true`；否则，返回 `false`。

 

**示例 1:**

**输入:** nums = [1,3,5,4,2,6]

**输出:** true

**解释:**

选择 `p = 2`, `q = 4`：

- `nums[0...2] = [1, 3, 5]` 严格递增 (`1 < 3 < 5`)。
- `nums[2...4] = [5, 4, 2]` 严格递减 (`5 > 4 > 2`)。
- `nums[4...5] = [2, 6]` 严格递增 (`2 < 6`)。

**示例 2:**

**输入:** nums = [2,1,3]

**输出:** false

**解释:**

无法选出能使数组满足三段式要求的 `p` 和 `q` 。

 

**提示:**

- `3 <= n <= 100`
- `-1000 <= nums[i] <= 1000`

        You will be provide a description of problem and a reference solution of it in Typescript and then you should generate the right solution of that problem.
        The reference solution may be wrong, so just refer it, DO NOT translate it.

__data__.output:
```erlang
-spec solve(nums :: list()) -> boolean().
solve(nums) ->
    N = length(nums),
    case N of
        _ when N < 3 -> false;
        _ -> check_trionic(nums, 1, N - 2, N - 1)
    end.

check_trionic(nums, P, _, _) when P >= N - 1 -> false;
check_trionic(nums, P, Q, N) ->
    StrictlyIncreasing = check_strictly_increasing(nums, 0, P),
    case StrictlyIncreasing of
        true ->
            StrictlyDecreasing = check_strictly_decreasing(nums, P, Q),
            case StrictlyDecreasing of
                true ->
                    StrictlyIncreasing2 = check_strictly_increasing(nums, Q, N - 1),
                    case StrictlyIncreasing2 of
                        true -> true;
                        false -> false
                    end;
                false -> false
            end;
        false -> false
    end.

check_strictly_increasing(nums, Start, End) ->
    lists:all(fun(I) -> I < lists:nth(I + 1, nums) end, lists:seq(Start, End - 1)).

check_strictly_decreasing(nums, Start, End) ->
    lists:all(fun(I) -> lists:nth(I, nums) > lists:nth(I + 1, nums) end, lists:seq(Start, End - 1)).
```

```erlang
-spec solve(list()) -> boolean().
solve(nums) ->
    N = length(nums),
    case find_pq(nums, N) of
        {true, _} -> true;
        _ -> false
    end.

find_pq(nums, N) ->
    lists:foldl(
        fun(P, Acc) ->
            case find_q(nums, P, N) of
                {true, Q} ->
                    {true, Q};
                _ ->
                    Acc
            end
        end,
        {false, 0},
        lists:seq(1, N - 2)
    ).

find_q(nums, P, N) ->
    lists:foldl(
        fun(Q, Acc) ->
            case check_trionic(nums, P, Q, N) of
                true -> {true, Q};
                _ -> Acc
            end
        end,
        {false, 0},
        lists:seq(P + 1, N - 1)
    ).

check_trionic(nums, P, Q, N) ->
    Inc1 = check_increasing(nums, 0, P),
    Inc2 = check_decreasing(nums, P, Q),
    Inc3 = check_increasing(nums, Q, N - 1),
    Inc1 andalso Inc2 andalso Inc3.

check_increasing(nums, Start, End) ->
    lists:all(
        fun(I) -> nums(I) < nums(I + 1) end,
        lists:seq(Start, End - 1)
    ).

check_decreasing(nums, Start, End) ->
    lists:all(
        fun(I) -> nums(I) > nums(I + 1) end,
        lists:seq(Start, End - 1)
    ).
```

        You will be provide a description of problem and a reference solution of it in Typescript and then you should generate the right solution of that problem.

__data__.output:
```erlang
-spec solve(nums :: list(integer())) -> boolean().
solve(nums) ->
    N = length(nums),
    case N of
        _ when N < 3 -> false;
        _ -> check_trionic(nums, 1, N - 2, N - 1)
    end.

check_trionic(nums, P, Q, N) ->
    case check_increasing(nums, 0, P) of
        true ->
            case check_decreasing(nums, P, Q) of
                true ->
                    case check_increasing(nums, Q, N - 1) of
                        true -> true;
                        false -> false
                    end;
                false -> false
            end;
        false -> false
    end.

check_increasing([], _, _) -> true;
check_increasing([H | T], I, J) when I < J ->
    case T of
        [] -> true;
        [H1 | T1] when H < H1 ->
            check_increasing(T1, I + 1, J);
        _ -> false
    end.

check_decreasing([], _, _) -> true;
check_decreasing([H | T], I, J) when I < J ->
    case T of
        [] -> true;
        [H1 | T1] when H > H1 ->
            check_decreasing(T1, I + 1, J);
        _ -> false
    end.
```

```erlang
-spec solve(nums :: list()) -> boolean().
solve(nums) ->
    N = length(nums),
    case find_pq(nums, N) of
        {p, q} -> true;
        false -> false
    end.

find_pq(nums, N) ->
    lists:foldl(
        fun(P, Acc) ->
            case find_q(nums, P, N) of
                {Q, true} -> {P, Q};
                _ -> Acc
            end
        end,
        false,
        lists:seq(1, N - 2)
    ).

find_q(nums, P, N) ->
    lists:foldl(
        fun(Q, Acc) ->
            case check_trionic(nums, P, Q, N) of
                true -> {Q, true};
                _ -> Acc
            end
        end,
        false,
        lists:seq(P + 1, N - 1)
    ).

check_trionic(nums, P, Q, N) ->
    StrictlyIncreasing1 = check_strictly_increasing(nums, 0, P),
    case StrictlyIncreasing1 of
        true ->
            StrictlyDecreasing = check_strictly_decreasing(nums, P, Q),
            case StrictlyDecreasing of
                true ->
                    StrictlyIncreasing2 = check_strictly_increasing(nums, Q, N - 1),
                    if
                        StrictlyIncreasing2 -> true;
                        true -> false
                    end;
                false -> false
            end;
        false -> false
    end.

check_strictly_increasing(List, Start, End) ->
    lists:all(
        fun(X) -> X < lists:nth(1, List) end,
        lists:sublist(List, Start, End - Start)
    ).

check_strictly_decreasing(List, Start, End) ->
    lists:all(
        fun(X) -> X > lists:nth(1, List) end,
        lists:sublist(List, Start, End - Start)
    ).
```
